rationale: The cited 2007 paper is directly about product contagion via perceived/physical contact and contamination mechanisms, while the citing 2008 paper explicitly positions itself against prior work that had mostly documented negative contagion and tests a physical transfer mechanism in retail. Given this strong construct and mechanism overlap (contagion, contact, contamination beliefs) and close temporal/topic proximity, this is likely more than an incidental mention and should be reviewed in full.
